zh.lifeSummary: 當Henrie Ainsworth於1567年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾博爾頓時，他的父親Gyles Henrie Aimsworth20歲，母親Lady Eline Dean20歲。他於1589年10月30日與Jean Harwood在英國藍卡爾哈伍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1615年3月29日在英國英格蘭爾福洛善姆享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾福洛善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henrie Ainsworth于1567年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾博爾頓时，他的父亲Gyles Henrie Aimsworth20岁，母亲Lady Eline Dean20岁。他于1589年10月30日与Jean Harwood在英国藍卡爾哈伍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1615年3月29日在英国英格兰爾福洛善姆享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾福洛善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Ainsworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Manchester named Ainsworth, from the Old English personal name Ægen + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
English (Yorkshire): in Yorkshire the name was a variant of, or confused with   Hainsworth  .

variants.name: Hainsworth
meanings: (Yorkshire): habitational name from Hainworth in Keighley, Yorkshire, named from the Old English personal name Hagena + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. The intrusive -s- was acquired by the late 15th century, probably through false association with the Lancashire surname Ainsworth in 2 below.
variant of Ainsworth in Lancashire. Names such as de Haynesworth and de Heynesworth occur in the surrounding area in the 14th century.

nameMeanings.name: Henrie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Henry ( and Heinrich ), especially common in Denmark.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henrie Ainsworth was born in 1567, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gyles Henrie Aimsworth, was 20 and his mother, Lady Eline Dean, was 20. He married Jean Harwood on 30 October 1589, in Harwood, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 29 March 1615, in Frodsham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Frodsham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henrie Ainsworth est né en 1567, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gyles Henrie Aimsworth, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Eline Dean, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Jean Harwood le 30 octobre 1589, à Harwood, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1615, à Frodsham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Frodsham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henrie Ainsworth 1567 in Bolton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gyles Henrie Aimsworth 20 und seine Mutter Lady Eline Dean 20. Er hat am 30. Oktober 1589 in Harwood, Lancashire, England Jean Harwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. März 1615 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Frodsham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Frodsham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henrie Ainsworth è nato il nel 1567 nel Bolton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gyles Henrie Aimsworth, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Eline Dean, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Jean Harwood il 30 ottobre 1589, nel Harwood, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 marzo 1615, nel Frodsham, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Frodsham, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henrie Ainsworthが1567年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアボルトンで生まれた時，父Gyles Henrie Aimsworthは20歳，母Lady Eline Deanは20歳であった。1589年10月30日にイギリスランカシュアイアハーウッドでJean Harwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1615年3月29日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアフロドシャムで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアフロドシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henrie Ainsworth(이)가 1567년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gyles Henrie Aimsworth(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Eline Dean(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1589년 10월 30일 영국 랭카실르 하우드에서 Jean Harwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1615년 3월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프로드샤에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프로드샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henrie Ainsworth nasceu em 1567, em Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gyles Henrie Aimsworth, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eline Dean, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Jean Harwood em 30 de outubro de 1589, em Harwood, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1615, em Frodsham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Frodsham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henrie Ainsworth родился в 1567 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gyles Henrie Aimsworth было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eline Dean, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Jean Harwood 30 октября 1589 г. в местности харвуд, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 марта 1615 г. в местности фродшам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности фродшам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henrie Ainsworth nació en 1567, en Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gyles Henrie Aimsworth, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Eline Dean, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jean Harwood el 30 de octubre de 1589, en Harwood, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1615, en Frodsham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Frodsham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
